channel.title: Aquarium on unixorn.github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Aquarium on unixorn.github.io

item.title: First Neos
item.description: Got my first neocaridinas yesterday! Decided on Yellow Golden Backs from LVexoticfish.com. Have to give them props - as advertised, all the shrimp arrived alive. They were very well packaged - they had a regular fish bag with the shrimp and a bit of mesh for them to hold on to, inside a heat-sealed outer clear bag to contain any leaks (there weren’t any though) from the inner bag, and that bag was inside the silver thermal bag here.

item.title: What are these plants?
item.description: Just started a new 5 gallon tank. Haven’t had fish tanks in years, and someone local generously gave me some plant trimmings when cleaning his tanks, and I forgot what species they are.
